type_definitions.name: GuideEntry
type_definitions.description: Pre-existing domain struct representing an external guide entry. Removed as part of orphan external_guides code deletion (IN-10). Classified as dto (explicitly accepted R1 deviation for action:delete): plain data container with no validation invariants (R3: not a validated value) and no serde derives. value_object is inapplicable (no validation invariant to establish). The R1 violation (dto forbidden in domain) is accepted because this is an action:delete entry documenting a pre-existing type that no longer exists in code.

type_definitions.name: GuideMatch
type_definitions.description: Pre-existing domain struct representing a matched guide entry. Removed as part of orphan external_guides code deletion (IN-10). Classified as dto (explicitly accepted R1 deviation for action:delete): plain data container with no validation invariants (R3: not a validated value) and no serde derives. value_object is inapplicable (no validation invariant to establish). The R1 violation (dto forbidden in domain) is accepted because this is an action:delete entry documenting a pre-existing type that no longer exists in code.

type_definitions.name: ComplianceContext
type_definitions.description: Skill compliance result struct. Modified in T006: field guide_matches removed; only skill_match remains. Classified as value_object (explicit accepted deviation per briefing Known Accepted Deviations): is_empty() is a pure accessor; render() derives display output from the contained value. No other valid domain kind applies (free_function requires stateless top-level fn; struct holds state). value_object is the only viable classification.

type_definitions.name: check_compliance
type_definitions.description: Performs a skill compliance check. Signature simplified in T006: removed guides and guide_limit parameters; now takes only prompt.

type_definitions.name: find_matching_guides
type_definitions.description: Pre-existing free function that matched guides against a prompt. Removed in T006.

type_definitions.name: trigger_matches
type_definitions.description: Pre-existing free function that checked trigger keyword matching. Removed in T006.
